flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Hawaii at Manoa fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Hawaii at Manoa rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (36.7% → 44.1%).
